hooks.command: front=$(lsappinfo info -only name "$(lsappinfo front)" 2>/dev/null); case "$front" in *Ghostty*) ;; *) /Users/woom/personal/claude-notifier.app/Contents/MacOS/terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message '응답이 완료되었습니다' >/dev/null 2>&1; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; true
